description: Maintainability refactor from the 2026-06-09 /code-review audit (PRUNE; Batch C part 2). skills/workflow-document-project/scripts/document_project.py is ~810 lines doing five distinct jobs: project inventory, synthesis-payload parsing/validation, blueprint + project-doc rendering, in-process blueprint validation, and atomic file I/O. Split it into focused sibling modules (e.g. inventory.py, synthesis.py, render.py, validate.py, plus the atomic-write helpers) while keeping the public CLI (build_parser/main subcommands: inventory, write, synthesize) and the imported function names stable. Pure structural change with NO behavior change: the existing tests/ suite (35 tests) is the regression gate and must stay green; skill_lint stays 0/0. Lower priority than the rest of the audit (most churn for least functional gain), so deferred. Sibling audit items already shipped: PR #6 (batch 1), #7 (batch 2: live_run resilience + adapter timeout), #8 (batch A: document_project atomic writes / YAML-safe frontmatter / loud validation), #9 (batch B: cross-platform scaffold tests), #10 (batch C1: dead-code removal).
title: Split document_project.py into focused modules
